title: data-cn memo-fetch pack
description: Equity memo data bundle for a single CN/HK ticker. Tier 2 ONLY — CN primary-source individual-stock disclosure (cninfo / HKEXnews) is deferred from v2.0.0 scope. yfinance is the current floor for financials. _provenance.tier is integer 2 (CN-specific; data-us uses string 'A').

_provenance.description: Tier-status block. CN memo-fetch is locked at Tier 2 because primary-source individual-stock disclosure (cninfo / HKEXnews) is not integrated.

tier.description: Tier 2 = aggregator/scraper floor. Always integer in CN (data-us uses string 'A').

primary_source_status.description: v2.0.0: always 'deferred' for CN. Reserved enum values for forward-compat.

primary_source_candidates.description: Named primary-source repositories evaluated but not integrated.

tier_note.description: Human-readable echo of the tier-status reason. Surface in memo footer.

yfinanceFinancials.description: yfinance financials (income / balance-sheet / cash-flow). period=annual|quarterly. WARNING: Tier 2 — never use for verdict-grade memos without cross-check vs cninfo / HKEXnews / company filings.
